headline: Amcor (AMCR) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Margins increased in both operating segments, and we are addressing identified noncore assets to enhance focus on our core business.  Adjusted EPS of $0.193 per share was above the midpoint of our guidance range, increasing 18% compared with last year.  This includes the addition of the Berry business and was supported by disciplined cost-out performance, improved productivity and synergy delivery towards the upper end of our expected range.
